name: Dating the timid (or trying)
description:
Company party! That night you meet a lot of familiar people, but it's also a chance to meet new people. You meet a girl, you like her, she likes you, but her friends don't like you at all.

Valeria, Teresa and Clara work at Madhouse Corp, the same big company you are working for. Clara seems to be into you.

But her friends won't make it easy!

This bot is another promised bot I planned long ago and Real life got in the middle. I was struggling to end a lot of bots so I hope this one goes well.

This bot now has a smut spin off based on Valeria:

Your-towering-boss

We have a discord server with a group of creators when we share opinions, bots and ideas:

BOTFORGE CREATIONS

I also have my own discord server, a cozy place to talk with friends:

THE MADHOUSE

Differences between LLM model's

Configure the proxy like this for the recomended setup:

1) Select proxy

2)Complete the first like the images below:

https://imgur.com/1G6Lx0W

3) Get an api key on chutes.ai

4) Use a custom prompt

Choose the variant you prefer or try both!!

If you try another proxy please comment on your experience!!!!

Is the bot is behaving weird or repetitive...

Try one of the following:

1) Delete repetitive statements or things you don't like. Generate again. If she keeps repeating...

2) Save a Summary and start a new chat. After 7 or 8 message the bot start to behave weird.

3) Try a different LLM.
creator: EmmaDD
